strings.prefs.uiScaleHelp: 150% is recommended for 4K displays. Fonts, menus, spacing, scrollbars, and toolbar sizes scale together.
strings.prefs.uiScaleRestartHelp: Scaling applies immediately. After restart, the font atlas is rebuilt at the target pixel size for the sharpest text.
strings.prefs.saveLayoutHelp: Saves window docking and sizes continuously. When disabled, the last saved layout is preserved.
strings.prefs.reopenProjectHelp: Without an explicit --project, reopens the last successfully opened project. Automation and the last abnormal shutdown are not retried blindly.
strings.prefs.restoreSceneHelp: The current editing scene is stored in the user workspace and does not rewrite the project's Start Scene.
strings.prefs.shortcutsHelp: These bindings are shared by menus and global command routing. Active text fields keep keyboard priority through ImGui focus routing.
strings.prefs.customEditorHelp: Placeholders: {file}, {line}, {column}, {project}, {solution}, {workspace}. Without {file}, the script path is appended.
strings.prefs.scriptEditorHelp: VS Code is the default. Script assets reuse the project workspace and open at the requested line. Open C# Project opens the project folder or .code-workspace in VS Code, and the containing .sln/.slnx in Visual Studio or Rider.
strings.game.waiting: Waiting for the Game View texture
strings.console.selectMessage: Select a message to inspect its details.
